ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course */,
  "track_length" INTEGER /* Length of the track */,
  "track_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "official_rating" INTEGER /* Official rating of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "breeder" TEXT /* Breeder of the horse */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the horse */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse */,
  "career_starts" INTEGER /* Number of career starts */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Number of career wins */,
  "career_places" INTEGER /* Number of career places */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the jockey */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the jockey in years */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the jockey */,
  "places" INTEGER /* Number of places by the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the trainer in years */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the trainer */,
  "places" INTEGER /* Number of places by the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "course" TEXT /* Name of the racing course */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the racing event */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the racing event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the racing event */,
  "gate" INTEGER /* Gate number of the racing event */,
  "race_comment" TEXT /* Commentary on the racing event */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Prize money for the race */,
  "number_of_runners" INTEGER /* Number of runners in the race */,
  "going" TEXT /* Going of the track */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_course FOREIGN KEY ("course") REFERENCES courses ("course_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "weight_carried" REAL /* Weight carried by the horse */,
  "finished_position" INTEGER /* Finished position of the horse */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin by which the horse finished */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the horse */,
  "beaten_by" REAL /* Distance beaten by the horse */,
  "jockey_claim" INTEGER /* Jockey claim for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight record */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight carried by the horse */,
  "weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the horse
Experience of the jockey in years
Number of wins by the jockey
Number of places by the jockey
Experience of the trainer in years
Number of wins by the trainer
Number of places by the trainer
Unique identifier for each racing event
Time taken to complete the racing event
Gate number of the racing event
Number of runners in the race
Margin by which the horse finished
Unique identifier for each weight record
Last login timestamp of the user
